name: Patient Dashboard
description: Patient overview dashboard with appointments, vitals tracking, and medication management. Central hub for health and wellness portal users.

page_briefs.overview: Patient home dashboard at /dashboard. Top row of KPI cards shows key vitals (heart rate, blood pressure, weight, steps) with sparkline trends. Below, an agenda-style calendar lists upcoming appointments with provider name, time, and type (in-person or telehealth). Quick-action buttons for booking appointments and refilling medications.
page_briefs.vitals: Vitals history view at /vitals. Grid of time-series charts (blood pressure, heart rate, weight, glucose) with selectable date ranges. Below the charts, a sortable data table lists individual readings with timestamp, value, and source device. Sparkline cells in each row show recent trend direction.
page_briefs.medications: Medication management at /medications. Data table lists active medications with name, dosage, frequency, prescribing provider, and refill date. Day calendar view below shows today's medication schedule with check-off capability for dose tracking.

shells.sidebar-main: Persistent left sidebar with patient navigation, main content area
